llm_unified_plan.aggregation_instruction: Sum all record counts from individual table queries to derive total schema records in the local snapshot

passes.expected_result: Total record count across all snapshot tables

sql.query: SELECT SUM(ROWCOUNT) as total_records FROM dim_collection UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) as total_records FROM br_campaign_segment UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) as total_records FROM dim_blueprint UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) as total_records FROM dim_campaign UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) as total_records FROM dim_connector UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) as total_records FROM dim_property UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) as total_records FROM dim_segment UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) as total_records FROM dim_target

passes.subtask: Count total records across all tables in the local snapshot
